candidate.notes: same label 'wall feature' across non-adjacent places

object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: White-painted baseboard molding runs along the bottom of the walls; approximately 3-4 inches high, consistent around the entry perimeter and contrasts with wood floor.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs under the painting along the right wall and continues to the back wall under the window and door
object_a.object_text_long: right sector | White-painted baseboard molding runs along the bottom of the walls; approximately 3-4 inches high, consistent around the entry perimeter and contrasts with wood floor.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: right sector | White-painted baseboard molding runs along the bottom of the walls; approximately 3-4 inches high, consistent around the entry perimeter and contrasts with wood floor.

object_b.label: wall feature
object_b.description: white baseboard trim along floor-wall junction
object_b.long_form_open_description: Painted white baseboard approximately 3–4 inches tall runs along the bottom of the walls; visible where the wood floor meets the wall in the hallway and door threshold. Clean, with slight shadowing where it meets the floor.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Runs beneath the hanging flag and continues toward the open door; forms the junction between the hardwood floor and walls.
object_b.object_text_short: white baseboard trim along floor-wall junction
object_b.object_text_long: center sector | Painted white baseboard approximately 3–4 inches tall runs along the bottom of the walls; visible where the wood floor meets the wall in the hallway and door threshold. Clean, with slight shadowing where it meets the floor.
